title: Boots of Speed

markdown:
# Boots of Speed

While you wear these boots, you can take a [[bonus_action Action]] to click the boots' heels together. If you do, the boots double your [[speed]], and any creature that makes an [[opportunity_attack Attack]] against you has [[disadvantage]] on the attack roll. If you click your heels together again, you end the effect.

When you've used the boots' property for a total of 10 minutes, the magic ceases to function for you until you finish a [[long_rest Rest]].
